title: Hunger Effect Reflavor
description: A change to the Hunger Potion effect to make it interesting!
body:
This mod opts to change the Hunger potion effect in a way that makes more sense to the effect itself, as well as makes Hunger a more dangerous effect in some survival settings!

The Hunger potion effect can no longer be removed by simply waiting it out - if you are hungry, you are hungry! Now, the only way to get rid of food is eating decent food, or drinking from a milk bucket!

For those that want to know more about what's going on under the hood...

Food value of 4 or lower is not good enough to remove Hunger

Food value of 5 has a 25% chance to remove Hunger

Food value of 6 has a 50% chance to remove Hunger

Food value of 7 has a 75% chance to remove Hunger

Food value of 8 or higher will remove Hunger!



_For example: Bread (value of 5) has a 25% chance to remove Hunger upon eating!_


 
This mod was made to play nice with Iron's RPG Tweaks!
